decisions_made_during_autonomous_run.rationale: Single-instance VM; Quartz JobStore overkill. ShedLock 7.x required for SB 3.5 + JVM 17+ (research corrected 5.16 → 7.7.0).

decisions_made_during_autonomous_run.decision: Deterministic _id = SHA-256 hex first 16 chars of JSON-encoded PK array
decisions_made_during_autonomous_run.rationale: Internal data + low row counts; 16 chars sufficient. JSON encoding prevents separator-collision (Pitfall L5).

decisions_made_during_autonomous_run.decision: Log aggregator = Splunk HEC via LogstashTcpSocketAppender
decisions_made_during_autonomous_run.rationale: Citi enterprise standard per CLAUDE.md context.
Boot 3.2+ ships this. Hand-rolled would lose Brave TraceContext.

decisions_made_during_autonomous_run.decision: Maven Enforcer Micrometer pin = scoped requireSameVersions (core + tracing trains) + bannedDependencies ceiling at 2.0.0
decisions_made_during_autonomous_run.rationale: Unscoped dependencyConvergence fails on pre-existing spring-data-elasticsearch httpclient transitive split.
Planning thought it was a mapping change; actual bug was pattern.toLowerCase() against case-preserving .keyword. 3-line code fix.

context_notes: User went out asking for autonomous execution of phases 5-8. Set workflow.skip_discuss=true and workflow.auto_advance=true to bypass the AskUserQuestion gates. All planning decisions logged with D-N.M IDs to autonomous-log.md. Multiple cwd-drift incidents during execution where worktree agents accidentally committed to milestone/modernization directly via absolute paths — every one was caught pre-commit; no protected refs were rewound. Real bugs were caught by Playwright UAT (Phase 3 had 4 defect rounds: /initial schema + 5 AG-Grid v35 modules missing + ColumnApiModule + useRecentSearches cross-instance sync). Phase 7 surfaced one planner defect (unscoped dependencyConvergence trips on pre-existing httpclient transitive conflict) — re-dispatched executor with Option A scoped requireSameVersions. Phase 8 found the hyphen bug was much smaller than expected — 3-line Java fix not a mapping change. All 86 backend tests + 10 tlm-stats tests green at pause time.
